ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 此服务器的唯一友好名称

ast.target: MCP 服务器的 HTTP 端点

ast.target: 服务器已存储 OAuth 令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command to spawn the MCP server process
ast.target: 用于启动 MCP 服务器进程的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line
ast.target: 可选的 KEY=VALUE 对，每行一个

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to this server when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时连接到此服务器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View the complete plugin documentation and guides
ast.target: 查看完整的插件文档和指南

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property name where summaries are stored when using "Summarize Active File" command.
ast.target: 使用“Summarize Active File”命令时存储摘要的 Frontmatter 属性名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where plugin data is stored. Agent sessions are saved in Agent-Sessions/, custom prompts in Prompts/.
ast.target: 存储插件数据的文件夹。代理会话保存在 Agent-Sessions/，自定义提示保存在 Prompts/。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Store agent session history as markdown files in your vault. Sessions are automatically saved in the Agent-Sessions subfolder with auto-generated titles based on conversation content.
ast.target: 将代理会话历史以 Markdown 文件形式存储在你的库中。会话会自动保存到 Agent-Sessions 子文件夹，并根据对话内容自动生成标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stream AI responses word-by-word as they are generated for a more interactive chat experience.
ast.target: 按生成过程逐词流式输出 AI 回复，带来更具交互性的聊天体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to the console. Useful for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志。便于排查问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reveal advanced settings for power users.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of retries when a model request fails.
ast.target: 模型请求失败时的最大重试次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first retry. Subsequent retries will use exponential backoff.
ast.target: 首次重试前的初始延迟（毫秒）。后续重试将采用指数退避。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to check for new models (0 to disable auto-update)
ast.target: 检查新模型的频率（0 表示禁用自动更新）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use built-in model list when API discovery fails
ast.target: 当 API 发现失败时使用内置模型列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stop agent execution when a tool call fails. If disabled, the agent will continue executing subsequent tools.
ast.target: 当工具调用失败时停止代理执行。若禁用，代理将继续执行后续工具。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the agent to create and edit files without confirmation. Destructive operations (delete, move) always require confirmation.
ast.target: 允许代理在无需确认的情况下创建和编辑文件。破坏性操作（删除、移动）始终需要确认。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent the AI from repeatedly calling the same tool with identical parameters
ast.target: 防止 AI 使用相同参数重复调用同一工具

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of identical tool calls before considering it a loop (default: 3)
ast.target: 在视为循环前允许的相同工具调用次数（默认：3）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time window to check for repeated calls (default: 30 seconds)
ast.target: 用于检查重复调用的时间窗口（默认：30 秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update the index when files are created, modified, or deleted.
ast.target: 在文件创建、修改或删除时自动更新索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index PDFs and other supported file types in addition to markdown notes. Requires reindexing.
ast.target: 除 Markdown 笔记外还索引 PDF 和其他受支持的文件类型。需要重新索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model for this session
ast.target: 为此会话选择 AI 模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 控制随机性（0 = 确定性，2 = 非常有创意）

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 核采样阈值（0 = 仅顶部 token，1 = 所有 token）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: The path of the note to use for determining the attachment folder location where the image file will be saved. This does NOT insert the image into the note - it only affects where the image file is stored. If not provided, uses the currently active note to determine the attachment folder.
ast.target: 可选：用于确定附件文件夹位置的笔记路径，图像文件将保存在该位置。这不会将图像插入笔记，只会影响图像文件的存储位置。若未提供，将使用当前活动笔记来确定附件文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the skill to activate (e.g., "code-review", "data-analysis")

ast.target: 技能名称（1-64 个字符，仅限小写字母、数字和连字符，例如：“code-review”、“meeting-notes”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: A description of what this skill does and when to use it. Should include keywords that help identify relevant tasks.
ast.target: 对该技能作用及使用时机的描述。应包含有助于识别相关任务的关键词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full markdown body content of the SKILL.md file. Should include step-by-step instructions, examples, and edge cases.
ast.target: SKILL.md 文件的完整 Markdown 正文内容。应包含分步说明、示例和边界情况。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query. Can be a question, topic, or concept to search for.
ast.target: 搜索查询。可以是要搜索的问题、主题或概念。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)
ast.target: 返回的最大结果数（默认：5，最大：20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit search to files in this folder path (e.g., "projects" or "projects/2024")
ast.target: 将搜索限制为此文件夹路径中的文件（例如，“projects”或“projects/2024”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter by tags. Multiple tags use OR logic (matches any tag).
ast.target: 按标签筛选。多个标签使用 OR 逻辑（匹配任一标签）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file to write

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content to write to the file

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the folder to create

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the file or folder to delete
ast.target: 要删除的文件或文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current path of the file or folder to move
ast.target: 要移动的文件或文件夹的当前路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: New path for the file or folder (including filename for files)
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的新路径（文件需包含文件名）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search pattern (supports wildcards: * matches any characters, ? matches single character)
ast.target: 搜索模式（支持通配符：* 匹配任意字符，? 匹配单个字符）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text or regex pattern to search for within file contents
ast.target: 在文件内容中搜索的文本或正则表达式模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether search should be case-sensitive (default: false)
ast.target: 搜索是否区分大小写（默认：false）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to treat query as a regular expression (default: false). When false, searches for literal text.
ast.target: 是否将查询视为正则表达式（默认：false）。为 false 时，搜索字面文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files with matches to return (default: 50)
ast.target: 返回包含匹配项的最大文件数（默认：50）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of lines before and after each match to include for context (default: 2, max: 5)
ast.target: 每个匹配项前后用于上下文的行数（默认：2，最大：5）

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未配置 Google API 密钥

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported
ast.target: 仅支持 HTTP 和 HTTPS URL

ast.name: error
ast.source: No response generated from URL content
ast.target: 未从 URL 内容生成响应

ast.name: error
ast.source: No analysis generated from page content
ast.target: 未从页面内容生成分析

ast.name: error
ast.target: 技能管理器服务不可用

ast.name: error
ast.source: RAG indexing service is not ready. Please wait for initialization to complete.
ast.target: RAG 索引服务尚未就绪。请等待初始化完成。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No File Search Store configured. Please reindex your vault.
ast.target: 未配置文件搜索存储。请重新索引你的保管库。

ast.name: error
ast.source: RAG API client not available. Please wait for service initialization.
ast.target: RAG API 客户端不可用。请等待服务初始化。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No file is currently active in the editor
ast.target: 编辑器中当前没有活动文件

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill name must not contain consecutive hyphens (--)
ast.target: 技能名称不得包含连续的连字符（--）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill name must contain only lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens, and must not start or end with a hyphen
ast.target: 技能名称只能包含小写字母数字和连字符，且不能以连字符开头或结尾

ast.name: label
ast.target: 用于网络地址的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values
ast.target: 必须等于允许的值之一

ast.name: message
ast.target: 继续进行其他工具调用...

ast.name: name
ast.source: Apply Custom Prompt to Current Note
ast.target: 将自定义提示应用到当前笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 初始化/更新知识库上下文 (AGENTS.md)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 用 AI 解释选中内容

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter a name for your custom prompt...
ast.target: 为你的自定义提示词输入名称...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What would you like to know about this text?
ast.target: 你想了解这段文本的什么内容？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Trusted tools skip the confirmation dialog. Untrusted tools require approval before each execution.
ast.target: 受信任的工具会跳过确认对话框。不受信任的工具在每次执行前需要批准。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Trusted Mode allows the AI agent to create and edit files in your vault without asking for confirmation. Destructive operations (delete, move) will still require confirmation.
ast.target: 信任模式允许 AI 代理在你的库中创建和编辑文件而无需确认。破坏性操作（删除、移动）仍需要确认。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This grants the AI write access to your vault. While convenient, it carries risks if the model hallucinates or makes mistakes.
ast.target: 这将授予 AI 对你的库的写入权限。虽方便，但如果模型产生幻觉或出错，会带来风险。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your vault index is stored in Google Cloud. Do you want to delete it?
ast.target: 你的库索引存储在 Google Cloud。要删除吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you keep the data, re-enabling will be faster.
ast.target: 如果保留数据，重新启用会更快。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有文件匹配你的搜索

ast.name: text
ast.source: A previous indexing operation was interrupted. Would you like to resume or start fresh?
ast.target: 之前的索引操作被中断。你想要恢复还是重新开始？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Resume will continue from where you left off, skipping already-indexed files.
ast.target: 恢复将从你上次中断的位置继续，跳过已索引的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No MCP servers configured. Click "Add Server" to get started.
ast.target: 未配置 MCP 服务器。点击“添加服务器”开始。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 创建新的自定义提示词

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search and read files in your vault
ast.target: 在你的库中搜索并阅读文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search the web and fetch information

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查找所有带有 #important 标签的笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create a weekly summary of my meeting notes
ast.target: 创建我的会议笔记周总结

ast.name: text
ast.source: Research productivity methods and create notes
ast.target: 研究提升效率的方法并创建笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Organize my research notes by topic
ast.target: 按主题整理我的研究笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your AI assistant that can actively work with your vault.
ast.target: 能主动与你的库协作的 AI 助手。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 📖 了解更多关于代理模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Refresh my understanding of your vault
ast.target: 刷新我对你的库的理解

ast.name: text
ast.source: Help me understand your vault structure and organization
ast.target: 帮助我了解你的库结构和组织方式

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings override the global defaults for this session only. Changes are saved automatically.
ast.target: 这些设置仅覆盖本会话的全局默认值。更改将自动保存。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is a major update focused entirely on the powerful Agent Mode.
ast.target: 这是一次重大更新，完全聚焦于强大的代理模式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🤖 Unified agent-first interface - one powerful chat mode
ast.target: 🤖 统一的智能体优先界面 - 一个强大的聊天模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🔧 Tool calling built-in to every conversation
ast.target: 🔧 每次对话内置工具调用

ast.name: text
ast.source: 💾 Persistent agent sessions with full history
ast.target: 💾 具有完整历史记录的持久智能体会话

ast.name: text
ast.target: ⚡ 更智能、更强大的 AI 助手

ast.name: text
ast.source: Move your History/ folder to History-Archive/
ast.target: 将你的 History/ 文件夹移动到 History-Archive/

ast.name: text
ast.source: Keep all your old conversations as readable markdown files
ast.target: 将所有旧对话保留为可读的 markdown 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Let you start fresh with the new agent sessions
ast.target: 让你用新的智能体会话重新开始

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please wait while your old history is being archived...
ast.target: 正在归档你的旧历史记录，请稍候...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your old history is still in the History/ folder and has not been modified.
ast.target: 你的旧历史仍在 History/ 文件夹中，且未被修改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No old history found - you're ready to start fresh!
ast.target: 未找到旧历史 - 你已准备好重新开始！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your archived conversations are still readable markdown files
ast.target: 你的已归档对话仍是可读的 markdown 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open the Agent Mode panel to start using v4.0
ast.target: 打开 Agent Mode 面板以开始使用 v4.0

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try asking the agent to search your vault or create notes
ast.target: 试着让代理搜索你的 vault 或创建笔记
